name: Chilaquile Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Anaheim or poblano chili (minced) or 2 4-oz cans of diced green chilies
Cumin and dried bell pepper or oregano
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Butter or oil a 2-quart casserole or a 9-by-13-inch pan.
3. Tear 6 tortillas into bite-sized pieces and spread them evenly in the casserole.
4. Spread half the chilies and half the cheese over the tortillas.
5. (Optional) Spread, sprinkle, or place any optional items on top of the cheese.
6. Tear the remaining tortillas and spread them on top.
7. Follow with the remaining chilies and cheese.
8. Beat the eggs and buttermilk together with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Pour slowly over the casserole.
10. Bake uncovered for 35 minutes.
11. Serve hot, warm, or at room temperature.
